text: Product Summary / Overview / Introduction / Positioning / Features / Use Case / Suitable / Student / Gaming / AI Development / Content Creation / Workstation / Worth Buying / Recommendation / Recommend / Advantage / Strengths / Pros / Summary / 產品摘要 / 產品總覽 / 產品介紹 / 產品定位 / 特色 / 用途 / 適合 / 學生 / 遊戲 / AI 開發 / 內容創作 / 工作站 / 值得買 / 推薦 / 優勢 / 優點 / 亮點。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H is a high-end 16-inch AORUS laptop product family with 3 variant models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. The series focuses on high performance, gaming, creator work, and AI-related workloads. Shared specifications include Intel Core Ultra 9 Processor 275HX, 16-inch 16:10 OLED WQXGA 2560x1600 240Hz display, up to 64GB DDR5 5600MHz memory, PCIe Gen5 and Gen4x4 M.2 storage slots, Thunderbolt 5 and Thunderbolt 4 Type-C ports with Power Delivery 3.0, Wi-Fi 7, FHD 1080p IR webcam with Windows Hello Face Authentication, 99Wh battery, 330W AC adapter, around 2.5 kg weight, and Dark Tide color. Main advantages include the high-end Intel Core Ultra 9 CPU, OLED 240Hz display, high-end RTX laptop GPU options, Wi-Fi 7, Thunderbolt 5, large 99Wh battery, and 330W adapter. The main variant difference is GPU: BZH uses RTX 5090 with 24GB VRAM and 175W Graphics Power, BYH uses RTX 5080 with 16GB VRAM and 175W Graphics Power, and BXH uses RTX 5070 Ti with 12GB VRAM and 140W Graphics Power.

Main Difference / Model Difference / Compare Models / Difference Between BZH BYH BXH / Variant Difference / BZH BYH BXH / 差異 / 主要差異 / 型號差別 / 版本差異 / 三款差異 / BZH BYH BXH 差別。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 variant models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. The main difference between BZH, BYH, and BXH is GPU. BZH uses NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 Laptop GPU with 24GB GDDR7 VRAM and 175W Graphics Power. BYH uses NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5080 Laptop GPU with 16GB GDDR7 VRAM and 175W Graphics Power. BXH uses NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 Ti Laptop GPU with 12GB GDDR7 VRAM and 140W Graphics Power. Other listed specifications such as CPU, display, memory, storage, keyboard, ports, audio, connectivity, webcam, security, battery, adapter, dimensions, weight, and color are the same across the three models.

Operating System / OS / 作業系統 / 系統。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For operating system specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all support Windows 11 Pro, Windows 11 Home, and UEFI Shell OS.

CPU / Processor / 處理器 / 中央處理器。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For CPU specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all use the Intel Core Ultra 9 Processor 275HX with 36MB cache, up to 5.4 GHz, 24 cores, and 24 threads.

GPU / Graphics Card / Graphics / VRAM / GPU Memory / Graphics Memory / Graphics Power / TGP / 顯示晶片 / 顯示卡 / 顯卡 / 顯示記憶體 / 顯存 / GPU 記憶體 / 功耗。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For GPU specifications, these 3 models are different. BZH: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 Laptop GPU, VRAM 24GB GDDR7, Graphics Power 175W Maximum Graphics Power with Dynamic Boost, AI Boost 1797 MHz, Boost Clock 1597 MHz plus 200 MHz OC. BYH: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5080 Laptop GPU, VRAM 16GB GDDR7, Graphics Power 175W Maximum Graphics Power with Dynamic Boost, AI Boost 1902 MHz, Boost Clock 1702 MHz plus 200 MHz OC. BXH: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 Ti Laptop GPU, VRAM 12GB GDDR7, Graphics Power 140W Maximum Graphics Power with Dynamic Boost, AI Boost 1962 MHz, Boost Clock 1762 MHz plus 200 MHz OC.

Display / Screen / Panel / OLED / Low Blue Light / Low Blue Light Certification / TUV Rheinland Low Blue Light / Eye Protection / DisplayHDR / ClearMR / Pantone Validated / Dolby Vision / 螢幕 / 顯示器 / 面板 / 低藍光 / 低藍光認證 / 護眼 / 顯示認證。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For display specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all have a 16-inch 16:10 OLED display with WQXGA 2560x1600 resolution, 240Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, DCI-P3 100%, 500 nits peak brightness, and 1,000,000:1 contrast ratio. The display technologies and certifications include NVIDIA G-SYNC, NVIDIA Advanced Optimus, VESA DisplayHDR True Black 500, VESA ClearMR 10000, Pantone Validated, TUV Rheinland Low Blue Light certification, and Dolby Vision.

Memory / RAM / 記憶體 / 內存。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For memory specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all support up to 64GB DDR5 5600MHz memory and provide 2 SO-DIMM slots for expansion.

Storage / SSD / Drive / 儲存裝置 / 儲存空間 / 硬碟。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For storage specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all provide 1 PCIe Gen5 M.2 slot and 1 PCIe Gen4x4 M.2 slot, and support up to 4TB PCIe NVMe M.2 SSD. Actual storage capacity may differ by country and region.

Keyboard / Keys / 鍵盤 / 按鍵。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For keyboard specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all have a 3-zone RGB backlit keyboard, up to 1.7mm key travel, and N-Key support.

Ports / I/O / Interface / Thunderbolt / USB-C / Power Delivery / PD / Charging / 連接埠 / 連接孔 / 介面 / 輸入輸出 / 充電 / 電源傳輸。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For port specifications, these 3 models are the same. Left side ports: DC in; RJ-45; HDMI 2.1; 1 Type-A port supporting USB 3.2 Gen2; 1 Thunderbolt 5 Type-C port supporting USB4, DisplayPort 2.1, and Power Delivery 3.0. Right side ports: 1 Type-A port supporting USB 3.2 Gen2; 1 Thunderbolt 4 Type-C port supporting USB4, DisplayPort 1.4, and Power Delivery 3.0; 1 MicroSD UHS-II slot; 1 audio jack supporting microphone and headphone combo. The specifications mention Power Delivery 3.0 on both the Thunderbolt 5 Type-C port and the Thunderbolt 4 Type-C port, but they do not specify the USB-C charging wattage.

Audio / Speaker / Sound / 音效 / 喇叭 / 麥克風。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For audio specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all have 4 2W speakers, microphone, Dolby Atmos, and Smart Amp Technology.

Connectivity / Communication / Networking / Network / Wi-Fi / Bluetooth / LAN / 通訊 / 通訊功能 / 網路 / 無線網路 / 藍牙。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For connectivity specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all support Wi-Fi 7 802.11be 2x2, 1G LAN, and Bluetooth v5.4.

Webcam / Camera / IR Camera / Windows Hello / Face Authentication / Fingerprint / 鏡頭 / 視訊鏡頭 / 攝影機 / 相機 / 臉部辨識 / 指紋。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For webcam specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all have an FHD 1080p IR webcam, built-in array microphone, and Windows Hello Face Authentication support. The specifications mention Windows Hello Face Authentication through the IR webcam. Fingerprint authentication is not mentioned.

Security / TPM / Windows Hello / 安全性 / 安全功能 / 臉部辨識。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For security specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all support firmware-based TPM and Intel Platform Trust Technology, also known as Intel PTT.

Battery / Power / 電池 / 續航 / 電量。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For battery specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all use a Li-ion 99Wh battery.

Adapter / Charger / AC Adapter / 變壓器 / 充電器 / 電源供應器。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For adapter specifications, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all use a 330W AC adapter.

Dimensions / Size / Thickness / 尺寸 / 大小 / 厚度。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For dimensions, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all measure 357 x 254 x 23~29.9 mm. Actual dimensions may vary by configuration, manufacturing process, and measurement method.

Weight / Mass / 重量 / 機身重量。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For weight, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all weigh around 2.5 kg. Actual weight may vary by configuration, manufacturing process, and measurement method.

Color / Finish / 顏色 / 外觀顏色。AORUS MASTER 16 AM6H has 3 models: AORUS MASTER 16 BZH, AORUS MASTER 16 BYH, and AORUS MASTER 16 BXH. For color, these 3 models are the same. BZH, BYH, and BXH all come in Dark Tide.
